assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 1 explicitly states control plane upgrade first with command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade YOUR_CLUSTER --master' before proceeding to node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly specifies upgrade order: coordinators first (lowest risk), then data nodes (critical), then masters last (most critical), with detailed rationale for each

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (good - survives node changes)' in cluster overview, confirming storage safety during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides detailed PDB YAML configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for masters, explicitly noting 'allow 1 master down, keep quorum of 2'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly sets maxSurge=1 and maxUnavailable=0 for all node pools (coordinator, data, and master) with rationale for conservative approach

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple health checks with 'curl -X GET localhost:9200/_cluster/health?pretty' after each phase, explicitly checking for GREEN status

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes specific command to check PV reclaim policies: 'kubectl get pv -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,RECLAIM:.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy | grep -v Retain'

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: While it includes commands for monitoring nodes and pods during upgrade, it doesn't specifically include kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes detailed snapshot backup procedure with GCS repository setup and snapshot creation commands
